title: rubus weeberi
intro: Rubus weeberi, also known as the Indian raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus weeberi include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from various respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used to make jams and preserves, although its medicinal properties are typically extracted through the use of decoctions and infusions.
